_instructions: Copy this file, rename it to the character's name, fill in each field. Delete this _instructions key.
name: Full Display Name
role: prisoner | guard | warden | informant | visitor | staff
personality: 2-4 sentences describing how this character behaves, speaks, and reacts to others. This is sent directly to OPEN-LEE as the NPC persona.
backstory: 3-6 sentences of history. Crime, life before prison, key events inside prison walls. Sent to OPEN-LEE for context.
motivations: What does this character want most?
secrets: Things this character hides from others
dialogue_style: formal | street | cold | nervous | aggressive | philosophical | manipulative
storyRole: What narrative purpose does this character serve? Ally? Obstacle? Red herring? Key to escape?
notes: Anything else relevant to game implementation
